mapper.select: SELECT id, track_id, person_id, person_name, longitude, latitude, altitude, speed, direction, accuracy, source_type, device_id, gps_time, location_type, location_desc, extra_data, create_time, update_time FROM person_track_point WHERE person_id = #{personId} AND gps_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY gps_time ASC

SELECT id, track_id, person_id, person_name, longitude, latitude, altitude, speed, direction, accuracy, source_type, device_id, gps_time, location_type, location_desc, extra_data, create_time, update_time FROM person_track_point WHERE person_id = #{personId} AND gps_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY gps_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT person_id, COUNT(*) AS total_points, DATE(MIN(gps_time)) AS earliest_date, DATE(MAX(gps_time)) AS latest_date, COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(gps_time)) AS active_days, source_type, AVG(speed) AS avg_speed, COUNT(DISTINCT ROUND(longitude, 3), ROUND(latitude, 3)) AS grid_count FROM person_track_point WHERE person_id = #{personId} AND gps_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY source_type
